message:
✨ UX funnel improvements: reduce drop-offs + improve engagement (#1902)

* ✨ UX funnel improvements: reduce drop-offs + improve engagement

Targeted improvements based on GA4 funnel data showing 99% add-card
modal abandonment, 7.7% tour completion, and low mission adoption.

Add card modal:
- "Recommended for you" section with 5 popularity-ordered cards
- Track category browsing with ksc_card_category_browsed event

Smart suggestions:
- Delay appearance by 30s to avoid overwhelming new users
- Make suggestion reasons always visible (not hidden on mobile)
- Respect master hints suppression toggle

Dashboard analytics:
- Track time-on-page per dashboard (ksc_dashboard_viewed with duration)
- Flush final page duration on tab close via visibilitychange

Sidebar:
- Card count badges next to dashboard names (hidden on hover)

Feature hints system:
- New useFeatureHints hook for one-time contextual tooltips
- FeatureHintTooltip component with glass styling
- Cmd+K tooltip near search box (platform-aware shortcut)
- FAB shimmer animation for first-time users

Getting Started banner:
- 3 quick-action buttons: Browse Cards, Try a Mission, Explore Dashboards
- Shown to first-time users, dismissible via X

Master hints toggle:
- Settings > Analytics: "Onboarding hints & banners" toggle
- Single STORAGE_KEY_HINTS_SUPPRESSED guards all hint systems
- Manual tour restart via TourTrigger still available

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: differentiate Smart Suggestions title from Card Recommendations

Both sections showed "Recommended Cards for your clusters" which was
confusing. Rename SmartCardSuggestions title to "Smart Suggestions"
to distinguish cluster-analysis-based suggestions from priority-based
card recommendations.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,86 @@
+/**
+ * Feature Hints — inline, one-time tooltips for feature discovery.
+ *
+ * Unlike the tour (which interrupts the whole UI), hints appear
+ * near the feature itself and fire once per user (localStorage).
+ *
+ * Hint types:
+ *   - 'cmd-k'     — "Press Cmd+K to search" near search box
+ *   - 'card-drag' — "Drag cards to reorder" near card grid
+ *   - 'missions'  — "Try AI Missions" near missions toggle
+ *   - 'fab-add'   — shimmer ring on the floating "+" button
+ */
+
+import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react'
+import {
+  STORAGE_KEY_FEATURE_HINTS_DISMISSED,
+  STORAGE_KEY_HINTS_SUPPRESSED,
+} from '../lib/constants/storage'
+import {
+  emitFeatureHintShown,
+  emitFeatureHintDismissed,
+  emitFeatureHintActioned,
+} from '../lib/analytics'
+import { safeGetJSON, safeSetJSON, safeGetItem } from '../lib/utils/localStorage'
+
+export type FeatureHintType = 'cmd-k' | 'card-drag' | 'missions' | 'fab-add'
+
+/** Auto-dismiss feature hints after this duration (ms) */
+const FEATURE_HINT_AUTO_DISMISS_MS = 8_000
+
+function getDismissedHints(): Set<string> {
+  const raw = safeGetJSON<string[]>(STORAGE_KEY_FEATURE_HINTS_DISMISSED)
+  return new Set(raw || [])
+}
+
+function dismissHintInStorage(hintType: string) {
+  const dismissed = getDismissedHints()
+  dismissed.add(hintType)
+  safeSetJSON(STORAGE_KEY_FEATURE_HINTS_DISMISSED, Array.from(dismissed))
+}
+
+interface FeatureHintState {
+  isVisible: boolean
+  dismiss: () => void
+  action: () => void
+}
+
+export function useFeatureHints(hintType: FeatureHintType): FeatureHintState {
+  const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(() => {
+    // Suppress all hints if master toggle is off
+    if (safeGetItem(STORAGE_KEY_HINTS_SUPPRESSED) === 'true') return false
+    return !getDismissedHints().has(hintType)
+  })
+
+  const emittedRef = useRef(false)
+
+  // Emit shown analytics once and set auto-dismiss timer
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!isVisible || emittedRef.current) return
+    emittedRef.current = true
+    emitFeatureHintShown(hintType)
+
+    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
+      setIsVisible(false)
+      dismissHintInStorage(hintType)
+    }, FEATURE_HINT_AUTO_DISMISS_MS)
+
+    return () => clearTimeout(timer)
+  }, [isVisible, hintType])
+
+  const dismiss = useCallback(() => {
+    if (!isVisible) return
+    emitFeatureHintDismissed(hintType)
+    dismissHintInStorage(hintType)
+    setIsVisible(false)
+  }, [isVisible, hintType])
+
+  const action = useCallback(() => {
+    if (!isVisible) return
+    emitFeatureHintActioned(hintType)
+    dismissHintInStorage(hintType)
+    setIsVisible(false)
+  }, [isVisible, hintType])
+
+  return { isVisible, dismiss, action }
+}

 export const STORAGE_KEY_SESSION_COUNT = 'kc-session-count'
 export const STORAGE_KEY_VISIT_COUNT = 'kc-visit-count'
+export const STORAGE_KEY_FEATURE_HINTS_DISMISSED = 'kc-feature-hints-dismissed'
+export const STORAGE_KEY_GETTING_STARTED_DISMISSED = 'kc-getting-started-dismissed'
+export const STORAGE_KEY_HINTS_SUPPRESSED = 'kc-hints-suppressed'
